jsonLd.title: PGIMER is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
PGIMER, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PGIMER:
PGIMER is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PGIMER!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
